name: Unauthorized action
definition: Agent executes an action outside its intended mandate

name: Privacy violation
definition: Personal data processed beyond lawful basis, purpose, or retention

name: Consequential-decision harm
definition: Erroneous or biased automated decision significantly affecting a person

name: Deceptive interaction
definition: Humans not informed they are dealing with AI, or synthetic content not labeled

name: Security compromise
definition: Agent becomes an attack vector (prompt injection → tool abuse; credential exfiltration)

name: Oversight failure
definition: Human control points absent, bypassed, or rubber-stamped

name: Accountability gap
definition: Actions cannot be attributed, reconstructed, or explained after the fact

name: Cross-border data/regulatory breach
definition: Data or actions cross jurisdictional lines that trigger transfer or localization rules

name: Content-governance breach
definition: Generated content violates jurisdictional content rules

name: Runaway scope / cascade
definition: Errors compound across autonomous steps or delegated agents before detection

name: Vulnerable-population harm
definition: Minors or other protected groups exposed to inappropriate agent behavior

name: Systemic/model-level risk
definition: Risks attaching to the underlying general-purpose model (capability misuse thresholds, GPAI obligations)
